content:
# Ultrasonic Analysis

**Summary**: A method to measure the development of compressive strength in cement over time using ultrasonic pulse velocity.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] used ultrasonic analysis to monitor the growth of compressive strength in cement slurries containing varying amounts of Nano silica.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The addition of Nano Silica was observed to increase the growth rate of compressive strength as measured by ultrasonic means. ([[2012-amer|Amer, 2012, p. 43]])
